intent: The Weirgate Release — SETUP: the sanctioned Nudge names Professor Wren among the 'acceptable losses' at the gate; Vec orders Caden to hold the line; Caden refuses and steps forward; Vec moves to block him. Leads straight into the forced-outcome story-battle (Vec restrains Caden).

say.text: The prediction is clear. Some are too close to the gate to clear in time. Do NOT break ranks.
Caden — hold the line. HOLD it.
I'm not leaving her to a number.
